title: PHISHING SCAM
text: Tortola, BVI – 22 January, 2025 PHISHING SCAM Please be advised that we have identified a phishing scam involving at least one email address impersonating to be from the International Tax Authority (ITA). The suspicious emails come from addresses that end with .vg.co . These emails may appear to be legitimate but are not authorized communications from the ITA. We strongly encourage you to: · Carefully review any emails claiming to be from the ITA · Verify the sender’s email address before opening any links or attachments · Avoid clicking links or downloading attachments from suspicious messages · Report and block any suspected phishing emails in accordance with your organization’s security procedures Your vigilance is essential in helping prevent potential security incidents. If you have already interacted with a suspicious email, please report it immediately to your IT or security team. Have a query? Email us at info@bviita.vg Visit our website at https://bviita.vg Telephone: 1-284-394-4415
